title: Allay Maid
description: Replaces vanilla allays with allay females (Allay Maid literally)
body:
|**Allay Maid / Need [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), (or mods like etf, emf, etc. that will make this work on Fabric)** |:---:| ______________________________________________________________________________ |**This resource pack applies rule 63 on a vanilla allay turning him into a maid, and also feminizing it.** |:---:| ``` Works for 1.19.2+ and higher ```
______________________________________________________________________________ |**In the game, her name was also changed from an ordinary allay to a allay maid. Also, this pack plans to be update in the future if you like it.** |:---:|
